title: Lafayette Park - San Francisco - Tripadvisor
content: Beautiful Urban Park on Pacific heights. Across the street from spreckels Mansion, and the best view of the mansion. Great place to bring the kids to play.

title: Lafayette Park Hotel and Spa, San Francisco, CA - Five Star Alliance
content: Summary of 752 verified reviews ... Excellent family hotel. Great rooms in excellent location. Great pool. Awesome vibe. EXCELLENT Romantic Hotel. Top 1% in city.

title: Discovering Lafayette Park's past in San Francisco - Facebook
content: Visited Lafayette Park for the first time today. Inspired by Sex, Drugs & Disco, which I'm reading. It's so Pacific Heights - hard to believe

title: Lafayette Park - in San Francisco - LikeALocal Guide
content: Lafayette is a pretty and peaceful little park. It offers great views of the Pacific Heights neighborhood and the Bay. On sunny days you can see the Marina
